name: Infrastructure - WireMock
messageRegex: (?s).*(WireMockServer is not started|Address already in use|java\.net\.BindException|Failed to bind|Could not start WireMock).*
traceRegex: (?s).*(WireMockServer is not started|Address already in use|java\.net\.BindException|Failed to bind|Could not start WireMock).*

name: Infrastructure - HTTP transport
messageRegex: (?s).*(ConnectException|SocketTimeoutException|UnknownHostException|HTTP call failed|HTTP call interrupted|Connection refused|Connection timed out).*
traceRegex: (?s).*(ConnectException|SocketTimeoutException|UnknownHostException|HTTP call failed|HTTP call interrupted|Connection refused|Connection timed out).*

name: API - Serialization / mapping
messageRegex: (?s).*(JsonProcessingException|JsonMappingException|MismatchedInputException|InvalidFormatException|Failed to parse response body|Cannot deserialize|Cannot construct instance).*
traceRegex: (?s).*(JsonProcessingException|JsonMappingException|MismatchedInputException|InvalidFormatException|Failed to parse response body|Cannot deserialize|Cannot construct instance).*

name: Test data - Null / missing value
messageRegex: (?s).*(NullPointerException|Cannot invoke .* because .* is null|No recorded call for|No value present).*
traceRegex: (?s).*(NullPointerException|Cannot invoke .* because .* is null|No recorded call for|No value present).*

name: Assertion error (Bug)
messageRegex: (?s).*(AssertionError|AssertionFailedError|Multiple Failures|Expecting actual:|Expecting .* to be equal to|expected: .* but was:).*
traceRegex: (?s).*(AssertionError|AssertionFailedError|Multiple Failures|Expecting actual:|Expecting .* to be equal to|expected: .* but was:).*
